title: Minimum Cost to Hire K Workers
titleCn: 雇佣 K 名工人的最低成本

testcases.input: quality = [10,20,5], wage = [70,50,30], k = 2 Output: 105.00000 Explanation: We pay 70 to 0th worker and 35 to 2nd worker.
testcases.expectedOutput: 105.00000 Explanation: We pay 70 to 0th worker and 35 to 2nd worker.

testcases.input: quality = [3,1,10,10,1], wage = [4,8,2,2,7], k = 3 Output: 30.66667 Explanation: We pay 4 to 0th worker, 13.33333 to 2nd and 3rd workers separately.
testcases.expectedOutput: 30.66667 Explanation: We pay 4 to 0th worker, 13.33333 to 2nd and 3rd workers separately.
